creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text:
It looks like upstream's CI stem from their master, but I don't think this is relevant. The bigger issue found in brnrd@'s follow-up pull request is that their CI is misconfigured [1], and while anyone can edit those configuration files and include them in pull requests, they have no effect unless one of their committers makes the edit (mere commits and merges don't count):
> (Reminder that modifications to the jenkinsfile will not be honored for non-committers)

[1] Example of python 3.6 run: https://travis-ci.org/pyca/cryptography/jobs/358012204
